name: forensic-rag-mcp
instructions: Use this backend for independent forensic methodology and reference grounding. Search results support analysis but do not replace evidence from the active case.

tools.name: kb_search_knowledge
tools.description: Semantic search across 23K+ incident response knowledge records (Sigma, MITRE ATT&CK, Atomic Red Team, KAPE, Velociraptor, LOLBAS, GTFOBins, and more).
tools.when_to_use: Use when you need independent procedure, artifact interpretation, tool caveats, or corroborating reference material.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid treating reference matches as proof of activity in the case without case evidence.
tools.output_notes: Returns source-backed knowledge snippets; cite them as reference context, not primary evidence.

tools.name: kb_list_knowledge_sources
tools.description: List all available knowledge sources in the RAG index.
tools.when_to_use: Use during orientation to understand what reference collections are available.
tools.output_notes: Returns source inventory and should be followed by targeted knowledge search when needed.

tools.name: kb_get_knowledge_stats
tools.description: Get RAG index statistics: document count, sources, and model info.
tools.when_to_use: Use as the backend health/readiness check or to confirm the reference index is populated.
tools.output_notes: Health/status output only; it is not investigation evidence.
